AttemptBounded.message: AttemptBounded violation: \A p \in PASSES : passAttempt[p] <= MAX_RETRIES + 1

ConcurrentUnblockInvariant.message:
ConcurrentUnblockInvariant violation: \A p \in PHASE2_PASSES :
    passAttempt[p] > 0 =>
      passVerdict["artifacts"] \in ENABLING_VERDICTS
ConcurrentUnblockInvariant.description: Verifier for invariant ConcurrentUnblockInvariant from ParallelPassDispatch spec

IndependentBudgetBounds.message:
IndependentBudgetBounds violation: \A p1, p2 \in PHASE2_PASSES :
    p1 /= p2 =>
      (passBudget[p1] >= 0 /\ passBudget[p2] >= 0)
IndependentBudgetBounds.description: Verifier for invariant IndependentBudgetBounds from ParallelPassDispatch spec

    passAttempt[p] > 0 implies
      passVerdict["artifacts"] in ENABLING_VERDICTS
